data.body: 3bff completion-verifier caught a REAL gap: AC6 required an 'artifact failures never fail the review' test that I'd omitted. Added 2 resilience tests (create/reuse failure + emit failure). Rebuilt stack (branch epic/374d-rebuild2): c3e4 31dc9ea7f + c639 64ef12e9d UNCHANGED (474/475 keep votes); 3bff a85752525, e51b ce07eafc4, de8a 455a73688 rebuilt w/ Change-Ids+signoff preserved. Re-pushed: 476/477/478 new patchsets, re-voting. Then close 3bff/e51b/de8a, epic, submit.
